raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint regarding how American Express handled a billing dispute for {$450.00} charged to my account on XX/XX/year> by XXXX XXXX for tickets to an event held on XX/XX/year>. 
The tickets were advertised as an intimate XXXX XXXX show. Based on this description, I reasonably expected a live performance intended for the audience. However, the event was actually conducted as a filmed production, and the performer did not perform for or engage with the audience. Attendees were used as background for filming rather than participants in a live show. This was materially different from what was advertised. 
I contacted the merchant on XX/XX/year> to request a refund, and they refused on XX/XX/year> citing a no-refund policy without addressing the misrepresentation. I then disputed the {$450.00} charge with American Express on XX/XX/year> for services not as described and provided supporting documentation. American Express denied my dispute on XX/XX/year> without properly addressing the misrepresentation. 
I am requesting that American Express reopen and reverse the denial of my dispute and issue a permanent credit of {$450.00} for the misrepresented service, consistent with their protections for services not provided as described.
